ads.name: Prometric Testing Exam
ads.description:
AIM: ENSURE EACH AND EVERY CANDIDATES ACHIEVEMENT GOALS 💯✍️

We provide the following services
-we provide exact same Quations and Answers that will come on your exam date

-if you took exam before and didn't get your desired score we can upgrade your score directly from the database system and also control your score during Exam

-we provide exact certificate without you taking the exam 100% 

-Renew expired license

100% save and guarantee and Ensure a secure pass.✍️

ads.name: Elite Pharma Academy
ads.description:
Elite Pharma Academy – Official Group
This group is created for pharmacists preparing for the Saudi Pharmacist Licensure Examination.
Here you will receive:
• Class schedules
• Study materials
• MCQ practice
• Mock exam updates
Founder: Saddam Hussain
